app.name: VANTA OS
app.tagline: The Operating System for Your Shopify Store

onboarding.title: Welcome to VANTA OS
onboarding.subtitle: Your AI agent for Shopify. Read the docs, accept the terms, and connect your store.
onboarding.consentLabel: I have read and accept the Privacy Policy and Terms of Service

canvas.title: Agent Canvas
canvas.subtitle: Tell VANTA what to do — it plans, confirms, and executes.
canvas.placeholder: Ask VANTA to do anything... (e.g. 'Find all products with 0 inventory')

starters.title: Try one of these to get started
starters.2: Draft Arabic SEO descriptions for my latest 10 products
starters.3: Analyze yesterday's failed orders and summarize why
starters.4: Add a 'Restocking Soon' tag to out-of-stock items

offline.title: You are offline
offline.body: Tasks already submitted are safely executing in the cloud.

canvas.duplicate: This task is already running. Please wait for it to complete before submitting again.

task.lowConfidence: I'm not fully certain I understood correctly — please review carefully before approving.

settings.title: Settings
settings.permissionsHint: Choose what the agent is allowed to touch. Changes take effect immediately.

killSwitch.title: Emergency Kill Switch
killSwitch.label: Disable agent globally
killSwitch.hint: When enabled, the agent aborts all pending tasks and rejects new input. Use this if you suspect the agent is misbehaving.
killSwitch.reasonLabel: Reason (optional, for your team's audit log)

guardian.title: Guardian Mode
guardian.label: Run proactive checks
guardian.hint: VANTA scans your store every 6 hours for $0 prices, low inventory, and broken links.

guardian.title: Guardian Alerts
guardian.subtitle: VANTA proactively watches your store for issues. Review and fix in one click.
guardian.noAlerts: No active alerts. Your store is in good shape.

automations.title: Recurring Missions
automations.subtitle: Turn a one-time command into a scheduled automation that runs on autopilot.
automations.empty: No automations yet. Run a task, then click 'Save as Automation' to schedule it.

history.title: Task History
history.subtitle: Every command, every change, every staff member — fully accountable.
history.empty: No tasks yet. Submit your first command on the Agent Canvas.

data.title: Data & Account Controls
data.subtitle: Export or delete all data VANTA holds about your store. Complements the mandatory GDPR webhooks.
data.deleteConfirm: This permanently deletes ALL data tied to {shop}. This cannot be undone. Continue?
data.exportReady: Your export is ready. We've also notified the shop owner by email.

legal.draftNotice: DRAFT — Generated as a strong starting point. Have your lawyer review before production use.

toasts.taskQueued: Task queued — VANTA is on it.
toasts.offline: You are offline. Cloud tasks continue running.
toasts.sessionRefreshed: Session refreshed — your action was completed.

commandPalette.hint: Press Enter to send to agent · Esc to close
